title: MCP settings not persisting in UI after migration
symptom: MCP settings toggle resets to off after navigating away from the page. This occurs for both instance-level and workflow-level MCP settings.
applies_when: Migrated from n8n Cloud to self-hosted
root_cause: The issue arises from a bug in the UI handling of MCP settings, which prevents the toggles from retaining their state after navigation. This was identified as a known limitation in the beta version of the instance-level MCP feature.
fix_steps: Upgrade n8n to version 2.9.0 or later
Verify that the MCP settings persist after toggling
agent_instruction: Upgrade n8n to version 2.9.0 to resolve the MCP settings persistence issue.
